description: This object is part of the Reaction object and describes either an educt, product, or modifier. The latter includes buffers, counter-ions as well as proteins/enzymes.

id.description: Unique identifier of the given object.
id.title: Id

species_id.description: Internal identifier to either a protein or reactant defined in the EnzymeMLDocument.
species_id.title: Species Id

stoichiometry.description: Positive float number representing the associated stoichiometry.
stoichiometry.title: Stoichiometry

constant.description: Whether or not the concentration of this species remains constant.
constant.title: Constant

ontology.description: Ontology defining the role of the given species.

title: ReactionElement
